questions.question: How do you prefer learning new concepts?

options.text: Doing hands-on practice and real experiments

questions.question: When studying for an exam, you usually…

options.text: Solving problems by doing practice repeatedly

questions.question: What helps you remember information best?

options.text: Building projects and working with real models

questions.question: In a group project, you prefer to…

options.text: Presenting and explaining to the team
Building and testing a real working prototype
A clean desk with visual aids on the wall
A quiet place with books and notes
Background music or study group discussions
Working in a lab and doing practical activities
Physically doing and demonstrating the concept

questions.question: Which app would you use most for studying?

options.text: Canva or Miro for visual content
Notion or Google Docs for writing notes
Practicing coding by building real projects and simulations
